prompt: A dramatic Japanese fantasy action RPG PlayStation 5 game cover poster in a dark ornate high-fantasy style, vertically composed like premium key art. Show three armored warrior women standing heroically in the foreground against a glowing night battlefield and a towering gothic fantasy castle city in the distance, with fireworks, embers, magical light trails, and a star-filled purple-blue sky. The central figure is a blonde elf-like knight with pointed ears, a fur-trimmed collar, silver and gold armor, and a powerful stance, holding an enormous double-headed ceremonial battle axe angled across the lower half of the image; the axe is highly detailed with filigree silver metalwork, turquoise-blue crystal inlays, and an intricate engraved circular blade. On the left stands a second female knight with long dark crimson hair, metallic breastplate armor in steel and burgundy tones, and a sword held downward; behind her looms 1 giant black raven or crow with one glowing blue eye. On the right stands a third female knight with long light brown hair covering her eyes, pointed ears, and glossy magenta-pink armor with revealing fantasy plate design; a quiver of arrows is visible behind her shoulder. Include 2 red flying bird-like creatures or phoenixes in the upper right sky. The mood is epic, intense, and slightly gothic, with dense sparks, glowing particles, rim lighting, and lavish metallic reflections. Add an ornate thin gold border framing the entire cover. At the top left, place a small circular emblem and the text "O-prompt Laboratory". Along the right side, add vertical Japanese tagline text: "絆と力に、運命を斬り拓け". At the bottom center, place the game title in large embossed gold serif letters: "ELYSION", with a subtitle beneath in smaller serif capitals: "REBIRTH". Below that, add the Japanese subtitle text "エリシオン・リバース". At the bottom left, include a realistic Japanese age rating badge reading "CERO C" with small text "15才以上対象". Along the bottom, add the Japanese tagline "美しき騎士たちの、終わりなき戦いが今、始まる。" and beneath it the English line "THE ETERNAL BATTLE OF THE KNIGHTS BEGINS NOW.". Make it look like polished AAA console box art for a nonexistent fantasy game, ultra-detailed, cinematic, richly textured, high contrast, with the composition dominated by the three women and the oversized axe.
